headline: Brent crude fell below $80 to ~$78.25 (-1.6%) on US-Iran peace deal / Strait of Hormuz reopening

headline: Current account surplus $459mn in May; ADB $700m insurance-sector loan approved
Federal Budget FY27 Rs18.8tn unveiled, 4% GDP target; super-tax relief NOT granted to banks/oil/fert
KSE-100 +0.49% to new high 181,398; volatile profit-taking after +6% week
SBP paused rate at 11.5% (06-15); business circles disappointed
Brent $94.17 / WTI $91.86 / Arab Light $94.18
note: Above thesis-assumed $93. Supports E&P (R-EXP-003). NB: E&P still flat-down 06-11 despite oil — circular-debt overhang suspected.

headline: NEC to approve Rs4.5tr uplift outlay + macro framework; Rs27bn for 20 uplift projects
note: CONFIRMS my budget event-risk flag with a real source (R-004). Sector re-rate risk; reason book holds cash.

headline: PPL signs MoU with Folio3 to explore AI use in upstream operations
note: Company-specific, minor positive sentiment for a holding.

headline: Pakistan records highest-ever monthly remittances at $4.3b (SBP)
note: PKR support, eases external pressure — mild risk-on.

headline: Pakistan short-term FX liabilities near $25bn
note: External fragility / tail risk overhang vs remittance positive.

headline: Petrol braces for hike, diesel set for massive drop
note: Diesel drop = OMC inventory-loss risk; monitor names only, not held.

headline: SBP raises ~Rs2tr through MTBs auction; central govt debt Rs81.9tr (end-Apr)
note: Rates stay high → banks NIM+ (R-001), high-debt cyclicals− (R-002). Confirms cement caution (DGKC/CHCC).

headline: US launches new strikes after Trump threatens to attack Iran 'very hard'
note: TOP NEW RISK — was absent from my 06-11 journal. Two-edged: oil-spike tailwind for OGDC/PPL/MARI but broad risk-off. Widen stops, hold cash.

headline: Up to 25pc sales tax on import of EVs likely
note: MTL is tractors not EV — negligible direct read.

headline: Economy +3.7% FY26 (fastest in 4yrs); LSM +6.6%; auto +31%; IT exports $2bn +47%
note: Macro growth tailwind; auto (MTL) + manufacturing supportive; cement demand proxy positive

headline: FY2026-27 budget presentation imminent/delayed; tax measures Rs660-700bn; Bilawal/PPP friction
note: R-004 LIVE event-risk: budget within prediction horizon. Tax/sector re-rate possible overnight. Raise event-risk flag, hold cash, no new swing entries.

headline: FY27 budget DETAIL — super tax CUT 10→8% for income >Rs500m; ABOLISHED only for mid-size Rs150-500m; banks/oil-gas/fertiliser EXCLUDED from cut
note: VERIFICATION CORRECTION vs SFE graphic which said 'super tax abolished' — FALSE as blanket claim. ATRL (oil/refining) & FFC/ENGROH (fertiliser) EXCLUDED → no super-tax relief for them. Mid-cap names with income <Rs500m are the real winners.

headline: FY27 budget — IT 0.25% FTR extended 3yrs to FY30; export min tax 2%→1.25%; exporter super tax waived
note: CONFIRMED. IT FTR + exporter relief real. Textiles net positive. SFE graphic correct here.

headline: FY27 budget — sales tax/duty removed on 100+ cancer medicine raw materials; CVT on declared foreign assets abolished; EV CKD concessions continued
note: CONFIRMED. Cancer-API relief real → oncology/pharma positive. CGT on equities UNCHANGED (no new transaction tax) = sentiment positive, confirmed.

headline: Oil slump on Mideast peace hopes; Indian shares best day in 2 months
note: Falling oil = E&P revenue headwind but eases import bill/inflation → net + for broad market & OMC margins. Contradicts R-EXP-003 ($90 oil tailwind) — oil now slipping.

headline: PKR +0.01% to 278.32/USD
note: Currency stable — no FX stress

headline: PSX outpaces peers; KSE-100 +18.4pc YTD, mkt cap $59.23bn; today index +1.59% to 172,400
note: Broad risk-on; strong breadth 282/167

headline: President approves PIA privatisation bill (Arif Habib consortium 75%)
note: Privatisation momentum = positive market sentiment; not a holding

source: SFE graphic (UNVERIFIED — not in BR/Dawn coverage)
headline: SFE claims: energy brownfield import-tax abolished (CNERGY/ATRL); construction customs 10% (GHNI); Rs30bn Hyderabad-Sukkur M-6
note: UNCONFIRMED in primary sources fetched 2026-06-13. Dawn shows construction WHT halved (not customs line); motorway specifics not found (Defence Rs3,000bn was flagged topmost priority). Treat as broker claim only — do NOT let drive any paper entry until confirmed in Finance Bill. Per Part G guardrail.

headline: 2026-27 Budget: super tax reduction benefits 216+ listed cos; pharma/real-estate relief
note: Super-tax relief EXCLUDES banks/oil-gas/fertilizer (FY27 memory) → no relief OGDC/PPL/FFC/ENGROH. Cement = construction-WHT winner (DGKC/CHCC).

headline: Brent crude crashes ~5.6% to ~$80/bbl, an 8-week low, on US-Iran interim peace progress
note: Falling-oil regime deepens (was ~$88-89 on 06-13, ~$94 on 06-11). E&P revenue-realization headwind. R-EXP-003 falling-oil regime persists; OGTI index +1.97% lagged broad +2.69%.

headline: Central bank keeps policy rate unchanged at 11.5pc; FX reserves $17.2bn
note: MPC held citing double-digit inflation; external account moderate. R-001 regime intact.

headline: Equities rally 2.69% to 177,039 (PRIOR-SESSION RECAP, 06-15)
note: DATE HYGIENE: this is the 06-15 close recap, NOT today. Today (06-16) closed 180,392.97 +1.89%. Tagged to correct prior date — no look-ahead.

headline: Oil prices slip to lowest since March; Brent ~$83.25
note: Falling-oil regime persists → relative E&P headwind (R-EXP-003 inverse). Rebounded slightly to $83.42 on 06-16.

headline: Risk appetite revived by US-Iran de-escalation + reform-oriented FY27 budget measures
note: Geopolitical de-escalation = lower oil but higher equity risk appetite. Cement budget winners (construction-WHT cut) led.

headline: SBP holds policy rate at 11.5% in final FY26 MPC meeting; cautious stance citing inflation, fiscal and global risks
note: No hike (49/49 hold-vs-hike split going in). Relief rally. R-004 binary event resolved. Rate-sensitive banks + leveraged cement rallied hardest.

headline: Aurangzeb sees budget upside from US-Iran deal
note: FinMin cautiously optimistic on FY27; energy infra damage needs time to normalize

headline: Business circles disappointed over SBP rate pause
note: SBP held 11.5% (confirmed); FPCCI wants single-digit. Elevated-rate regime persists → R-001 banks NIM thesis intact; cyclicals headwind remains.

headline: PKR firms to ~278.30 on softer oil; dollar near 10-day lows
note: Softer oil + firmer PKR = easing import bill; mildly + for OMCs/importers, neutral-to-slightly- for exporters.

headline: US-Iran deal: interim accord extends ceasefire 60 days, reopens Strait of Hormuz
note: Structurally bearish oil (Hormuz reopening); final nuclear/proxy issues unresolved — ceasefire could still break. Headwind for E&P realizations.

headline: Auto sector row rocks Senate body during Finance Bill 2026 review
note: Finance Bill auto provisions contentious; watch MTL re: tractor-sector tax treatment.

headline: Bulls toss KSE-100 index above 180,000 milestone
note: Headline refers to recent rally; today's index only +0.07% — momentum fading, digestion phase.

headline: Business circles disappointed over SBP rate pause
note: FPCCI wanted cuts; SBP held 11.5%. R-001 thesis intact — elevated rates support bank NIM.

headline: Iran memorandum of understanding is not final, says Trump
note: Trump caveat on Iran MOU — deal still conditional. Oil risk remains two-sided.

headline: Iranian oil tankers pass US blockade after US-Iran deal
note: Hormuz opening progressing; structurally bearish oil supply. E&P headwind continues.

headline: Oil falls below $80 as traders hope end of war, reopening of Hormuz
note: Brent now <$80; deepening bearish oil regime. Headwind for E&P. R-EXP-003 inverse thesis strengthening.

headline: Rupee registers gain against US dollar
note: PKR strengthening = improved macro sentiment; mild positive for importers, neutral for E&P.

headline: Spending cuts to hit growth, warns Fitch in review of FY27 budget
note: Fitch cautions on fiscal consolidation trade-offs — moderate negative for growth-sensitive sectors.

headline: Senate adopts 123 budget recommendations for FY2026-27 (income-tax threshold up, luxury taxes)
note: Advisory only; National Assembly Finance Bill passage still due ~06-30 = R-004 binary watch.

headline: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz; Brent $78.31 (-0.68%), set for -8% week
note: Weak/falling oil persists -> R-EXP-003 relative E&P drag watch live. Brent well under $80.

headline: Outflow of profit beats FDI by 32% (profit repatriation $2.154bn 11MFY26)
note: Structural risk-off undertone; weak foreign appeal.

headline: PSX tumbles over 1,800 points intraday as US-Iran Geneva talks postponed
note: Peace-trade unwind reverses the 4-day melt-up; risk-off. Drove the -1.36% close from intraday ATH.

headline: SBP FX reserves up $6mn to $17.221bn (as of Jun 12)
note: Reserves stable/slightly up.

impact: E&P headwind persists; OGDC rose +0.9% decoupling short-term
